decision_title: Performance concerns identified for Horizon Dashboard
evidence_quotes: there are some concerns about performance.

decision_title: Consideration of a better database for the project
evidence_quotes: Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.
The UI needs to look nicer.

decision_title: Agreement on inadequacy of current UI design
evidence_quotes: We all agreed the current design isn't great.

decision_title: Timelines discussed but no firm decisions made
evidence_quotes: There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.
We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually, but we're not sure when or how.
Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern but no numbers were shared.
The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.
We should probably document things better going forward.
